_meta.purpose: Route-segment membership for LC page-4 posts. The single drawn cable on page-4 path-1 is traversed by TWO non-adjacent route segments; lumping them in one Viterbi partition makes the route order non-monotonic and collapses post placement (see 260603-n4k-ROOTCAUSE.md). Phase 2 should partition by segment, NOT by a generic number-gap split (that regressed DWG).
_meta.scope: Reference data for the Phase-2 post-positioning rework. Not consumed by the parser yet.

segments.note: Posts 4-11: the main route descending the vertical street (continues from page 3, exits to page 5 between 11 and 12).

Posts 21-31: the route re-enters page 4 (after page 5) and runs across it. Post 22's number-label anchor (305,302) snaps nearest to the same cable path as segment A — this is the outlier that polluted segment A's Viterbi partition.
